arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Brentford – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal host Brentford in the Premier League this weekend buoyed by a historic win in midweek. The Gunners have one foot in the semi-finals of the Champions League after thrashing Real Madrid 3-0 at the Emirates. Declan Rice scored two brilliant free-kicks before Mikel Merino sealed the win with a sweet finish late on. arts.ttl: Crazy £100m price tag set for Liverpool, Arsenal & Man City transfer target
arts.sum: Clubs such as Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester City may reportedly have to pay as much as £100million for the transfer of Nottingham Forest star Morgan Gibbs-White. The England international has been in superb form for Forest this season, and CaughtOffside have previously been informed of the likes of Liverpool and Arsenal being keen on him.
